title: OdysseyCraft
description: A simple but unique RPG modpack with good performance, perfect for your new singleplayer world or server with friends!
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01f82b70b0c39081b70b12c1968f38b8704a99c1.webp)A simple but unique RPG modpack with good performance, perfect for your new singleplayer world or server with friends!

# **Description**

## **Install**
### **Client**
1. Download and install the modrinth app
2. Search for the modpack on the modrinth app
3. Go to the versions tab
4. Install the version you need

### **Server**
1. Go to the modrinth website on your browser
2. Search for the modpack in the modrinth website
3. Go to the versions tab
4. Copy the URL of the download button of the version you need
5. Go to this website: [https://fabulously-optimized.github.io/mrpack-to-zip/](https://fabulously-optimized.github.io/mrpack-to-zip/)
6. Scroll down to "download from URL"
7. Paste the URL and click download
8. Find and open the zip file in your file manager
9. Open the mods folder and copy-paste all of the mods into your servers mods folder
10. Remove all of the client-side mods (NOT the "client and server" or "client or server" mods)

## **Use**
### **Keybinds**
It is recommended to set all of the controls to different keys (you do not have to change the JEI controls).
### **Distant Horizons**
It is recommended to watch a tutorial on how to use Distant horizons and Chunky.
### **Resource packs**
Your resource pack screen should look like this for every resourcepack to work:
![Recommended resourcepack order](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48dc507e5bb944324f4cb55efa144957c700204d.png)

## **Features**
### **Powerful Progression**
Defeat harder getting bosses, upgrade your skills in the skill book and acquire powerful armor and weapons!
### **Intense & Immersive Combat**
Swing your swords around like a madman, or hammer your enemies into the ground! Now you can finaly hit some more monsters at the same time when surrounded! With cool first-person animations!
### **Epic Exploration**
Travel trough the world in a very unique way! Build your own ship, add a shiphelm, and your journey across the ocean can start! While searching for dungeons, with many monsters and strong bosses to fight, you can add cannons to prepare for battle! And when the ocean stops and you dont want to leave your new ship alone? Just remove your sails, and replace them with a big balloon! Land or ocean, you wont stop exploring! Sail or fly trough breathtaking biomes and cinematic mountain ranges! Also enjoy amazing interdimensional exploration, with the nether and the end also being updated!
### **Stunning Visuals**
This modpack has beautiful graphics, using amazing shaders with distant horizons and the whimscape resource pack! You also have amazing animations, first-person included!

## **Known bugs (I will try to fix if I can)**
- When on a ship, third person glitches (Not fixable because of incompatibilaties)

## **Future plans**
- Add in-game gallery images
- Create a discord server for issues, suggestions, feedback and extra files like a lite version
- (Maybe) Add the modpack to Curseforge
